entry.title: Julien added 'Bogie & Bacall: The Surprising True Story of Hollywood’s Greatest Love Affair'
entry.content: 📚 “Bogie & Bacall: The Surprising True Story of Hollywood’s Greatest Love Affair” by William J. Mann ⭐️ Rated: 4/5 📝 "Bogie & Bacall is less a dual biography than an attempt to set the record straight about two Hollywood legends. Mann does not shy away from their flaws, but neither does he seek to diminish their achi..." 🏷️ #WilliamJMann
